zh.Prussia, Prussia, Germany: 海因里希_普洛文次 海因里希_
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN於大約1050年出生在匈牙利時，他的父親Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau37歲，母親Mrs. Thiemo the Second22歲。他和Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1109年8月24日在奧地利享年60歲。

zh-hans.Prussia, Prussia, Germany: 海因里希_普洛文次 海因里希_
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN于大约1050年出生在匈牙利时，他的父亲Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau37岁，母亲Mrs. Thiemo the Second22岁。他和Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1109年8月24日在奥地利享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eckbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Gunner, Lars.

variants.name: Ekberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erland, Sten, Erik, Nels.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements ek ‘oak’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: "Egbert"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ecg ‘edge (of a sword)’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. This was borne by two English saints of the 8th century and by a 9th-century king of Wessex. It survived for a while after the Conquest, but fell out of use by the 14th century. It was briefly revived in the 19th century, but is now seldom used.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN was born about 1050, in Hungary, his father, Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau, was 37 and his mother, Mrs. Thiemo the Second, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress. He died on 24 August 1109, in Austria, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN est né environ 1050, à Hongrie, son père, Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thiemo the Second, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress. Il est décédé le 24 août 1109, à Autriche, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN um 1050 in Ungarn geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau 37 und seine Mutter Mrs. Thiemo the Second 22. Er hatte mit Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. August 1109 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Österreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN è nato il circa 1050 nel Ungheria, il suo padre, Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Thiemo the Second, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress. Morì il 24 agosto 1109, nel Austria, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Prussia, Prussia, Germany: プレウssンプロヴィンズ プレウssン
ja.lifeSummary: Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTENが約1050年にハンガリーで生まれた時，父Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggauは37歳，母Mrs. Thiemo the Secondは22歳であった。彼はMathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiressとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1109年8月24日にオーストリアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN(이)가 대략 1050년 헝가리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Thiemo the Second(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1109년 8월 24일 오스트리아에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Hungria, seu pai, Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Thiemo the Second, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1109, em Áustria, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN родился около 1050 г. в местности Венгрия, его отцу по имени Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thiemo the Second, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress. Он умер 24 августа 1109 г. в местности Австрия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eckbert "Egbert" I von FORMBACH-PUTTEN nació aproximadamente 1050, en Hungría, su papá, Thiemo the Second in the Quinziggau, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mrs. Thiemo the Second, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Mathilda Von Lambeck Puttin Heiress. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1109, en Austria, a la edad de 60 años.
